_publications._publicationTitle: Medium throughput biochemical compound screening identifies novel agents for pharmacotherapy of neurofibromatosis type 1.
_publications._context: Immortalized murine Nf1-negative and wild type mouse embryonic fibroblasts (MEF Nf1−/− E1A-p53 and MEF Nf1wt E1A-p53) were generously provided by Dr. Karen Cichowski
